concepts: inventory-reset reclaim after flush and value re-entry

next_cycle_focus: Keep the AXS / 1h exhaustion batch intact and wait for actual AXS results. Separately note that ETH / 1h channel shortbias v6 is now the strongest supported exploit benchmark, while DOGE / 4h continuation families are confirmed too sparse under walk-forward. Neither changes the status of the current AXS cycle until AXS-specific results arrive.
rationale: Cycle 117 remains open. This reflection packet contained meaningful results for older ETH exploit variants and older DOGE 4h failures, but no results for any of the three current-cycle AXS / 1h exhaustion families. Therefore there is no evidence yet to refine or abandon the flush-reclaim reversal, opening-range displacement fade, or inventory-reset reclaim branches from this cycle.
